title: User management
actionError: The action failed. Please try again.
notAdmin: You do not have admin access.
registrationDescription: When off, the registration form is rejected and no new accounts can be created. Existing users can still sign in.
cannotDisableSelf: You cannot disable your own account.
invalidQuota: Enter a whole number of 0 or more, or leave blank for the default.
passwordTooShort: The new password must be at least 8 characters.
promptNewPassword: Enter a new password for {email} (at least 8 characters):
passwordResetDone: Password reset for {email}. They must sign in again.
confirmForceLogout: Force {email} to sign out of all devices?
